channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.20 (Build 20260311)
item.description:
What's New

Refine Macro UI with toggle and bulk actions

  • Add per-macro enable/disable toggle with visual state feedback
  • Add Enable All / Disable All / Clear All bulk action buttons
  • Add confirmation dialog for Clear All action
  • Improve macro row layout with toggle switch and opacity states
  • Bump version

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
